reason: Command parsing and dispatch tests protect executable verbs and fail-closed unknown command behavior.
Channel entry, lease, and preparation validation protects queue and lease behavior before DB integration.
Config unit tests protect file/env/flag precedence, defaults, validation, and rooted config-file reads before executable dispatch.
Declaration parser and planner tests protect strict positive grammar, safe-change planning, and explicit installer rollback behavior.
Declaration execution tests protect preview/apply transaction order, unsafe-delta rollback, and explicit installer rollback behavior.
Journal event validation protects append-only payload and append-index behavior before DB integration.
Journal payload tests protect persisted document keys and codecs before kernel meaning and storage persistence consume them.
Kernel command preparation and Journal replay derivation protect routing semantics before DB integration.
Claiming command assembly protects lease grant token digest and lease window validation before DB integration.
Instruction assembly and replay tests protect operator corrective command records, preconditions, and outcomes before DB integration.
Lease command assembly protects extend and heartbeat token digest checks before DB integration.
Pause command and safety tests protect direct node pause routability before DB integration.
Resolution command assembly protects ack/nack token digest, declared-need, route, and failure payload facts before DB integration.
Routing tests protect outstanding-need replay and addressed/default target selection before DB integration.
Submission command assembly protects work-item construction and routing event allocation before DB integration.
Metrics collector tests protect bounded label sets, text encoding, series budget, and storage-gauge failure behavior before HTTP and DB integration.
Process ID tests protect opaque ID format, length, and random source failure behavior.
Process log record, event-matrix, correlation, sink, and non-exposure tests protect bounded diagnostic records and error-code fallback.
Read model unit tests protect complete assembly, dependency omission, no-cache behavior, and bounded response groups before HTTP and DB integration.
Registry value copies and named not-found errors protect the read contract.
Postgres readmodel query tests protect operational projections and row hydration before HTTP integration.
Postgres root tests protect adapter construction wrappers, search-path execution, and shared row mapping contracts before child stores consume them.
Postgres catalog tests protect declaration read/install row translation while transaction behavior is protected by DB-backed integration tests.
Postgres channel tests protect queue preparation, lease row hydration, and lease command behavior before DB-backed integration tests.
Postgres journal tests protect event row hydration and append/replay behavior before DB-backed integration tests.
Postgres kernel tests protect instruction application and transaction orchestration adapters while command semantics remain in kernel packages.
Postgres metrics tests protect storage aggregate row mapping before metrics collection and DB-backed integration tests.
Postgres migration tests protect planning, checksum drift detection, and migrator source selection before DB-backed integration tests.
Postgres registry tests protect record row hydration and named lookup behavior before DB-backed integration tests.
HTTP route, strict decoding, response envelope, and error-token coverage protects the accepted invocation transport before DB integration.
HTTP codec tests protect strict request decoding, payload compaction, error classification, and response writing before route families consume them.
Command route tests protect submit, claim, ack, nack, extend, heartbeat decoding and response behavior before root handler composition.
Compatibility route tests protect contract metadata emission and method rejection before root handler composition.
Diagnostics endpoint tests protect bounded accept, reject, fail, and complete records before route families consume the shared chassis.
Instruction route tests protect operator-key gating, dispatch decoding, and precondition conflict responses before root handler composition.
Operations route tests protect report response, bounded read query parsing, and malformed query rejection before root handler composition.
Probe route tests protect live and readiness response shape plus body rejection before root handler composition.
Metrics scrape route tests protect bounded text output and invalid request rejection before root handler composition.
Security gate tests protect bearer and operator-key rejection before root handler composition.
Credential verifier tests protect digest and file source authority, strict JSON decoding, and operator-key verifier loading before HTTP integration.
Submission construction rejects invalid values and protects payload aliases.
